name: Lokalise Localization API
what_it_does: Lokalise REST API for translation and localization management platform. Enables AI agents to manage translation keys, retrieve translated strings, upload/download locale files, trigger translation workflows, and integrate localization data into development pipelines. Lokalise is a leading developer-friendly l10n platform with strong CI/CD integration.
use_cases: Uploading new translation keys and downloading locale files from CI/CD pipeline agents
Querying translation coverage and missing key status from localization health agents
Triggering machine translation and review workflows from content localization agents
Integrating Lokalise translation data into product builds from release automation agents
not_for: One-off document translation (Lokalise is developer/product localization focused)
best_when: A product team using Lokalise wants AI agents to automate locale file management, track translation coverage, and integrate l10n workflows into CI/CD pipelines.
avoid_when: You have simple localization needs — Lokalise is a paid platform. For basic i18n, use free tools or cloud translation APIs directly.

auth.notes: Lokalise API token authentication (X-Api-Token header). Tokens generated in user profile. Project-scoped access via project IDs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: trial with 1,000 keys; limited features
pricing.notes: Per-project pricing. Developer-friendly with generous trial.

performance.rate_limits: Lokalise API: 6 req/sec; 3,000 req/min; 5,000 req/day on free

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API or SDK integration required
Rate limits are relatively strict — 6 req/sec on paid plans; design agents with throttling
Locale file upload is async — poll for import task completion before reading keys
Project IDs are required for all API calls — store them in agent configuration
Translation memory and machine translation are separate API calls from key management
agent_readiness.security_notes: Translation content may include sensitive product or marketing text. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency by default. API token must be secured.

security_score_components.security_notes: Translation content may include sensitive product copy. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency.
